name: Greek Yogurt Dressing With Blue Cheese
author: Cultures For Health
description: Creamy yogurt salad dressing with the sharp note of blue cheese is delicious over cold salads.

steps: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients, adding salt to taste. If the dressing is too thick, adding a little milk or milk kefir will help make it thinner.
Pour the dressing into a clean jar, screw the lid on, and shake really well.
Chill at least 3 hours before serving.
